name: Super Admin
description: Full access to all modules, configurations, logs, and database metrics.

name: Doctor
description: Access to check today's schedule, view patient files, write prescriptions, and upload medical reports.

name: Reception Admin
description: Access to schedule appointments, check-in patients, manage queue, issue bills, and print invoices.

name: Lab Admin
description: Access to patient lookup, diagnostic records queue, reports upload, and lab tests configuration.
